title: anemia villosa var. deltoidea
intro: Anemia villosa var. deltoidea, also known as Toothache Plant or Anemia villosa var., is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacampserotaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, where it grows in humid environments. The medicinal properties of Anemia villosa var. deltoidea lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain, particularly in the treatment of toothaches and other oral health issues. The plant can be prepared as a tincture or infused in hot water to consume, and it has been traditionally used to promote oral health, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues.
